title: rubus adenophyllus var. calvatus
intro: Rubus adenophyllus var. calvatus, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a lesser-known variety of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Rubus adenophyllus var. calvatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
